name: rss-erp
description: RSS Construction ERP - Rehan Shahid & Sons Builders & Developers

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@rss/shared && npm run build --workspace=@rss/api && npm run build --workspace=@rss/web
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:create && npm run db:push --workspace=@rss/api && npm run db:seed --workspace=@rss/api
